ALLOWED_HOSTS='example.com,www.example.com' -> parsed list

backendTests.note: Context/plan claimed 97 tests; the suite is actually 197 (FB/IG scrapers + CRM push added since the context doc was written). IMPORTANT: tests MUST run with DEBUG=true. With DEBUG unset/false, SECURE_SSL_REDIRECT=True issues 301s that break ~48 view/API tests using the Django test client over plain HTTP. This matches the pre-change behavior where DEBUG was hardcoded True. See deviations / follow-ups.

frontendCheck.result: 0 ERRORS (12 pre-existing warnings, none in new auth files)
